# Deep State of Mind (DSOM) For My AI

> **Entry Point 3:** This document serves as the External System Entry Point (AI Crawlers). See [START-HERE.md](START-HERE.md) for the human onboarding roadmap.

> DSOM is a Sovereign Metacognitive Framework and Digital Twin architecture for Infrastructure Engineering. It enforces strict GitOps, AIOps, and Ansible automation with zero-global memory. The AI's state and memory are explicitly tracked via Git version control in a "Sovereign Markdown Palace."

Important non-obvious constraints: AI agents must never run commands directly on remote nodes; they must write idempotent Ansible playbooks for human execution. Memory is externally persisted in `.agents/brain` preventing stateless session wipeouts.

## Core Entry Points
- [Start Here](START-HERE.md): The absolute master roadmap for onboarding to DSOM.
- [Project Readme](README.md): High-level overview and philosophy.
- [GitBook Summary](SUMMARY.md): Navigation index for GitBook integration.

## Governance & Ledgers
- [Agents Configuration](.agents/AGENTS.md): Core AI Rulebook and Persona profile.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Unreleased and recent framework changes.
- [History](HISTORY.md): Universal chronological ledger of project milestones.

## Architecture & Protocols
- [AI Master Protocol](docs/governance/AI-MASTER-PROTOCOL.md): The Sovereign Constitution outlining core GitOps, AIOps, and Ansible execution rules.
- [Cognitive Twin Protocol](docs/governance/AI-COGNITIVE-TWIN-PROTOCOL.md): The Project Identity Card defining target infrastructure (T1-T4) and security doctrines.
- [Palace Onboarding](docs/HOWTO-PALACE-ONBOARDING.md): Guide to the 8-room Sovereign Markdown Palace spatial memory architecture.
- [Start-Of-Day Ritual](docs/SOD-RITUAL.md): Procedure for AI reanimation.
- [End-Of-Day Ritual](docs/EOD-RITUAL.md): Procedure for AI state serialization and Git push.
- [Ritual of Transition](docs/RITUAL-OF-TRANSITION.md): Context-handover strategies.
- [GitOps Strategy](docs/governance/GITOPS-AIOPS-ANSIBLE-STRATEGY.md): Defense-in-depth, history sanitization, and infrastructure as code.
- [Python & UV Environment Guide](docs/governance/PYTHON-UV-ENVIRONMENT-GUIDE.md): Mandatory use of `uv` to ensure isolated execution environments.
- [DSOM Token Efficiency Report](docs/governance/DSOM-TOKEN-EFFICIENCY-REPORT.md): Mathematical audit proving a 96% token reduction via Progressive Disclosure.
- [Byte-Capped Execution Framework](docs/governance/BYTE-CAPPED-EXECUTION-FRAMEWORK.md): Procedural automation deploying `tiktoken` to programmatically intercept massive text payloads and block runaway context inflation.

## Agent Skills & Multi-Agent
- [Multi-Agent Protocols](docs/governance/MULTI-AGENT-PROTOCOLS.md): Governs safe deployment of Subagent Swarms via Git Worktree Isolation.
- [Agent Skills Guide](docs/AI-AGENT-SKILLS-GUIDE.md): How AI subagents utilize OKF-compliant execution manuals.
- [Skill Architecture](docs/governance/AI-SKILL-ARCHITECTURE.md): The structural design for OKF-compliant semantic AI skills.
- [OKF Adoption Guide](docs/OKF-ADOPTION-GUIDE.md): Standards for Open Knowledge Format (OKF v0.1) frontmatter.

## Strategy & Optimization
- [GitOps/AIOps/Ansible Strategy](docs/governance/GITOPS-AIOPS-ANSIBLE-STRATEGY.md): Doctrine for integrating AI planning with Defensive GitOps.
- [Generative Engine Optimization](docs/governance/GENERATIVE-ENGINE-OPTIMIZATION.md): Policy for ensuring documentation is machine-readable.
- [LLM Wiki Adoption](docs/governance/LLM-WIKI-ADOPTION.md): Defines the Sovereign Knowledge framework.

## Model Specifics
- [HOWTO: Create DSOM Gemini Gem](docs/HOWTO-CREATE-DSOM-GEMINI-GEM.md): Step-by-step guide to configuring a permanent DSOM Cognitive Twin inside the Google Gemini interface.
